achievements: Designed the application from scratch and implemented innovative UI features with TypeScript/React, integrating and supporting GraphQL APIs.
Built a reusable React component library that improved code manageability and reusability by ~60% across modules.
Led the Validata Evolution initiative, delivering technical and functional enhancements to transform the product into a modern SaaS solution.
Spearheaded UI design across multiple releases, coordinating with cross‑functional teams to deliver robust, scalable interfaces.
Partnered with 10+ stakeholders from inception to production to design and ship complex features for Oracle Cloud Commerce.
Optimized overall performance, reducing page load time by ~30% across major browsers.
Refactored core architecture to support personalization data (e.g., AddThis) and Wishlists for e‑commerce pages.
Delivered 30+ user‑facing features using React/CSS/Java to elevate shopping experiences.
Designed and built the Oracle Cloud Commerce front end from scratch with React + Redux, leveraging virtual DOM and advanced state management.
Engineered API and framework support for customer‑focused capabilities including Purchase Lists and Audiences.
Enhanced core personalization framework in collaboration with the Personalization team (experiments, recommendations, visitor ID).
Owned end‑to‑end design and implementation for Audiences and AddThis (architecture → UI) using KnockoutJS/Java/ATG.
Delivered Prioritized Loading improvements recognized by org and customers for meaningful performance and personalization gains.
Implemented event‑driven Order Approvals and efficient Price Group & Catalog determination via Functional Web hooks.
Contributed to the Portfolio Management Tool supporting Bank of America (BoFA) project oversight.
Developed and enhanced application features to meet evolving business requirements.
Resolved JIRA tickets within defined SLAs, ensuring smooth delivery and stability.

awards.title: Best Performer
awards.notes: Recognized as Best Performer for outstanding contributions.

awards.title: Hackathon Winner
awards.notes: Won Hackathon for Order Pooling implementation across regions.
